customer_segment.name: at_risk
customer_segment.label: Medium risk — some missed or late payments, may have arrears
customer_segment.note: Behavioural K-Means segment from payment patterns. Not the same as age-based personas (Ethan/Jordan/Sarah).

message: A late payment was recorded last cycle — but you can turn this around. Pay £50.0 by 2026-08-09 and rebuild your payment streak.

reasons: 1 of 3 qualifying payments made — 2 more needed
blockers: Missed or never-paid cycles on record
